weeklyCadence.label: Weekly Pack Refresh
weeklyCadence.rule: Every pack must be rebuilt weekly from latest-public-drops, live-intel, intel-vault, source files, book routes, and filtered forum exports. Active news links must stay source-labelled and expired links must move to the vault.

title: Black File Starter Pack
label: Orientation pack
summary: A first-entry pack for readers who need the Matrix Reprogrammed map: Black File, Epstein public-record lanes, trust rules, evidence boundaries, schema index, and reader paths.
weeklyMission: Give new readers the safest entry route: what is public record, what is allegation, what is speculation, what is still sealed, and where to go next.
brandLine: Start here before you believe anything. The map comes before the claim.
boundary: A dossier pack is an orientation bundle. It does not prove guilt, causation, intent, control, or criminal conduct.
contentAngles: What book explains the deeper map?

takeaways: Read claim labels before reading names.
Use the evidence vault to separate source types.
Use reader paths to choose the right book route.
Do not treat association, flight, email, or settlement as proof by itself.
